title: Clothes and fashion
explanation:
Clothes and fashion

  • items: suit, tie, boots, scarf, gloves, belt
  • adjectives: trendy, casual, formal, tight, loose
  • verbs: match, suit, try on, wear out

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: He wore a ____ and tie to the interview. | *suit | scarf | boots
These shoes don't ____ me — they're too small. | *fit | match | wear
Can I ____ these jeans in the changing room? | *try on | wear out | suit
She always dresses ____. Jeans and a T-shirt. | *casually | formally | tightly

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: That red bag ____ your shoes. | match
The dress is too ____. I need a bigger size. | tight
It's a ____ party — wear a smart dress. | formal
Those trainers are very ____ this year. | trendy

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I need a new ____ for my trousers. | *belt | scarf | fashion
These ____ are perfect for winter. | *boots | suit | trendy
Blue ____ you — you look great in it. | *suits | matches | tries
questions.feedback: Suits you = looks good on you.

questions.text: I've ____ out these shoes — I need new ones. | *worn | tried | matched
